top_signals.title: Tech Stocks Slide as Oil Climbs on Hormuz Standoff: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: A selloff in tech giants sent stocks lower, with the market also falling as oil jumped after clashes over the Strait of Hormuz raised concerns about a disruption in energy supplies that could fuel inflation.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Europe revives law allowing big tech to scan for CSAM
top_signals.summary: The law known as Chat Control 2.0 passed in the European Parliament, permitting companies like Google, Meta and Microsoft to scan users' messages to hunt for CSAM.
